tools.title: Color Picker
tools.description: Sample HEX, RGB, and HSL values from uploaded images with a zoomed picker and one-click copy.
tools.summary: Color Picker samples HEX, RGB, and HSL values from uploaded images with a zoomed canvas so reference colors can move straight into design or development.
useCases: Matching a color from a screenshot, logo, product photo, or moodboard.
Checking nearby pixels with a magnified view before copying the final value.
Translating visual references into usable CSS or design-token color formats.

tools.title: Case Converter
tools.description: Convert pasted text between common case formats, clean spacing, and copy the result in one click.
tools.summary: Case Converter reformats pasted text into common casing styles for labels, filenames, headings, code-adjacent strings, and content cleanup work.
useCases: Turning rough notes into title case, sentence case, camel case, or slug-ready text.
Normalizing lists of labels before moving them into a CMS, design file, or codebase.
Quickly removing casing inconsistencies from copied content.

tools.title: Proportion Scaler
tools.description: Scale dimensions proportionally, preserve aspect ratios, and copy resized width and height values.
tools.summary: Proportion Scaler calculates proportional width and height values from an original size, making aspect-ratio math quick and copyable.
useCases: Resizing images, embeds, canvases, videos, or design frames without distortion.
Finding a matching dimension when only one side is known.
Checking common ratios before exporting or implementing fixed-format assets.

tools.title: Image to Text
tools.description: Extract text from images locally in your browser, review OCR confidence, and copy or download the result.
tools.summary: Image to Text runs OCR locally in the browser, then provides confidence details, copy controls, and downloads for extracted text.
useCases: Pulling text from screenshots, scanned notes, labels, or image-based documents.
Checking OCR confidence before reusing the extracted result.
Keeping sensitive image-to-text work local to the browser session.

tools.title: Image Compressor
tools.description: Compress images in the browser, compare size savings, and download each file or the full batch as a ZIP.
tools.summary: Image Compressor processes image batches in the browser, compares savings, and exports individual files or a ZIP for faster pages and cleaner asset delivery.
useCases: Reducing large images before publishing them to a website or CMS.
Compressing a batch of screenshots, product images, or content assets together.
Checking size savings before deciding which output files to keep.

tools.title: Color Palette Generator
tools.description: Generate, tune, preview, and export color palettes for brand systems, mockups, and design projects.
tools.summary: Color Palette Generator helps explore color combinations, contrast, gradients, mockups, image inspiration, and saved palettes from one browser workspace.
useCases: Starting brand, landing page, dashboard, or campaign color exploration.
Previewing how a palette behaves in realistic UI and visual compositions.
Exporting reusable color values once the direction feels right.

tools.title: Vector Vault
tools.description: Search, preview, edit, upload, and export SVG icons from a local vector library.
tools.summary: Vector Vault provides search, preview, editing, upload, and export flows for SVG icons without turning icon cleanup into a larger asset-management task.
useCases: Finding and copying reusable SVG icons during interface design or development.
Editing icon details before export or handoff.
Keeping a practical local icon library for repeated project work.

tools.title: DNS Checker
tools.description: Check DNS records across public resolvers to compare propagation, response details, and lookup speed.
tools.summary: DNS Checker queries public resolvers in parallel so domain changes can be compared across record types, response values, and lookup timing.
useCases: Verifying A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME, or NS records after a DNS change.
Comparing resolver responses when a domain works in one place but not another.
Spotting propagation gaps before debugging hosting, email, or verification issues.

tools.title: Redirect Analyzer
tools.description: Trace URL redirect chains, status codes, final destinations, and HTTP-to-HTTPS upgrade behavior.
tools.summary: Redirect Analyzer follows a URL through status codes, hops, final destinations, and protocol changes so redirect behavior is easier to debug.
useCases: Checking whether a campaign, affiliate, or migrated URL lands in the right place.
Finding extra redirect hops that slow down a page or obscure the final URL.
Confirming HTTP-to-HTTPS upgrades and status codes during SEO cleanup.

tools.title: Sitemap Robots Explorer
tools.description: Explore robots.txt, discover sitemap files, scan URLs, and categorize site structure from one input.
tools.summary: Sitemap Robots Explorer reads a site entry point, discovers sitemap references, scans URLs, and groups discovered paths into useful categories.
useCases: Getting a fast view of a website's public URL structure.
Checking whether robots.txt exposes expected sitemap locations.
Categorizing discovered URLs before a content audit, migration, or technical SEO review.

tools.title: Modular Wireframe Generator
tools.description: Compose modular website wireframes, cycle section variations, and export layouts for design planning.
tools.summary: Modular Wireframe Generator combines common website sections, variation controls, and export options for fast planning of page layouts.
useCases: Exploring landing page, pricing, feature, gallery, contact, or testimonial structures.
Comparing section variations before committing to a full design pass.
Exporting a rough layout for discussion, documentation, or next-step design work.

tools.title: Image Converter
tools.description: Convert images to JPG, PNG, WebP, or PDF directly in the browser with batch controls and downloads.
tools.summary: Image Converter changes images into JPG, PNG, WebP, or PDF outputs with batch controls, file previews, and downloadable results.
useCases: Preparing images for a platform that requires a specific file type.
Converting several design, screenshot, or content assets in one pass.
Creating PDFs from image files for sharing, archiving, or quick review.

tools.title: Image Extractor
tools.description: Extract images from a webpage, review the discovered assets, and download individual files or a ZIP.
tools.summary: Image Extractor scans a webpage URL for discoverable image assets, groups useful results, and supports single-file or ZIP downloads.
useCases: Reviewing page imagery during content, migration, or redesign work.
Finding source image URLs without manually inspecting markup.
Collecting visible page assets for local analysis or cleanup.

tools.title: Font Converter
tools.description: Convert font files in bulk between web and desktop formats, then download ready-to-use outputs.
tools.summary: Font Converter batches font uploads, processes supported formats, and produces ready-to-download outputs for front-end builds, design handoff, or asset cleanup.
useCases: Preparing font assets for web projects that need browser-friendly formats.
Converting several font files at once instead of running one-off exports.
Organizing delivered typography assets before adding them to a project.

tools.title: Heatmap Tracker
tools.description: Prototype click heatmaps locally by placing hotspots on screenshots, seeding demo data, and exporting JSON.
tools.summary: Heatmap Tracker lets you place and export local click hotspots on a screenshot, making it useful for demos, design reviews, and early analytics planning.
useCases: Mocking up how click activity could look on a page or product screen.
Annotating a screenshot with interaction hotspots during UX review.
Exporting local heatmap point data for a prototype or proof of concept.

tools.title: Dictate
tools.description: Dictate notes in the browser, edit the transcript, keep local history, and play text back aloud.
tools.summary: Dictate provides a local speech-to-text workspace with editable transcripts, playback, and saved history for drafting notes without opening a heavier writing app.
useCases: Drafting rough notes, outlines, messages, or reminders by voice.
Reviewing dictated text, making edits, and listening back for flow.
Keeping short local transcript history for follow-up work.

tools.title: Campaign URL Architect
tools.description: Build clean UTM-tagged campaign URLs, preview every parameter, and keep a local history for reuse.
tools.summary: Campaign URL Architect turns a destination URL and campaign details into a clean tracked link, then keeps recent links in local history so recurring campaigns stay consistent.
useCases: Preparing paid, email, social, or partner campaign URLs before launch.
Checking that UTM values are present, readable, and free of stray spaces.
Reusing previous campaign structures without keeping a separate spreadsheet open.

tools.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
tools.description: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text by paragraph, sentence, or word count and copy it quickly.
tools.summary: Lorem Ipsum Generator creates filler text by paragraph, sentence, or word count so mockups and content slots can be tested quickly.
useCases: Filling design comps, wireframes, and prototypes with realistic text volume.
Testing layout behavior for short blurbs, long paragraphs, or repeated sections.
Copying placeholder text without opening a separate document or generator site.
